attributes.title: Buildkite PR Stats
attributes.description: Pull request build statistics from buildkite-builds.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"title": "Avg build span (h)", "hidePanelTitles": false, "syncColors": false, "syncCursor": true, "syncTooltips": false, "filters": [], "query": {"esql": "FROM buildkite-builds
| WHERE @timestamp >= NOW() - 4 weeks
  AND pipeline.slug == "elasticsearch-pull-request"
  AND pull_request.base == "main"
| STATS first_build = MIN(created_at), last_build = MAX(finished_at) BY branch
| EVAL duration_hours = DATE_DIFF("hour", first_build, last_build)
| STATS avg_duration_hours = AVG(duration_hours)
| EVAL label = "avg"
| KEEP avg_duration_hours, label
"}, "attributes": {"title": "Avg build span (h)", "references": [], "state": {"datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"a86de558-1c74-4238-ac4a-8da7422c292e": {"index": "1f6b23c0-2798-4f19-a7e7-023a3c508a57", "query": {"esql": "FROM buildkite-builds

| EVAL label = "avg"
| KEEP avg_duration_hours, label
